tasks.subject: Review BTK project structure and current state
tasks.description: Reviewed BTK project structure including README.md, CMakeLists.txt, directory layout, and identified all modules: BtkCore, BtkGui, BtkNetwork, BtkXml, BtkSql, BtkSvg, BtkOpenGL, BtkVulkan, BtkMultimedia, BtkWebKit, BtkXmlPatterns, BtkBml. Also examined external submodules (juice, ultimatepp, bobui-reference) and documentation structure in docs/ai/. The project aims for 1:1 feature parity with Qt 6/7, JavaFX, JUCE, GTK, WinUI, Ultimate++ while establishing BTK as a multi-user capable windowing toolkit.

tasks.subject: Create comprehensive Go porting plan for entire BTK framework
tasks.description:
Develop a detailed, incremental plan for porting all BTK modules from C++ to Go, including:
1. Priority ordering based on dependencies (Core first, then others)
2. Coding standards and conventions for Go port
3. Testing strategy for each module
4. Integration approach with existing Go components
5. Timeline and milestones for each module
6. Approach for handling C++ specific features in Go (pointers, manual memory management, etc.)

tasks.subject: Analyze BTK project structure and scope for Go port
tasks.description: Examine the BTK project structure to understand all modules, their dependencies, and determine the scope for porting to Go. This includes reviewing the core module and all optional components.

tasks.subject: Create comprehensive Go porting plan for entire BTK framework
tasks.description:
Develop a detailed, incremental plan for porting all BTK modules from C++ to Go, including:
1. Priority ordering based on dependencies (core first, then GUI, network, etc.)
2. Coding standards and conventions for Go port (naming, structure, idiomatic Go)
3. Testing strategy for each module (unit tests, benchmarks, examples)
4. Integration approach with existing Go components (bobui-reference, etc.)
5. Timeline and milestones for each module
6. Handling of platform-specific code and abstractions
7. Approach for signals/slots mechanism in Go
8. Memory management considerations (GC vs manual)
9. CGo interop strategy for remaining C++ dependencies
10. Documentation and examples strategy

tasks.subject: Port BTK Core module global types to Go
tasks.description: Port the BTK core global types (btkcoretypes.h) to Go, including all type aliases for Qt types like BTKString, BTKObject, BTKThread, etc.
tasks.activeForm: Porting BTK Core module global types to Go

tasks.subject: Port BTK Core module to Go - Foundation types, object model, threading, I/O, timers, properties, signals/slots
tasks.description: Port the BTK Core module to Go, which includes foundation types, object model, threading, I/O, timers, properties, and signals/slots. This is the foundational layer that other modules depend on.
tasks.activeForm: Porting BTK Core module to Go

tasks.subject: Create comprehensive Go porting plan for entire BTK framework
tasks.description:
Develop a detailed, incremental plan for porting all BTK modules from C++ to Go, including:
1. Priority ordering based on dependencies (Core first, then dependent modules)
2. Coding standards and conventions for Go port
3. Testing strategy for each module
4. Integration approach with existing Go components
5. Timeline and milestones
6. Specific porting approach for each module:
   - BtkCore: Foundation types, object model, threading, I/O, timers, properties, signals/slots
   - BtkGui: Widgets, painting, input, windowing, focus management, multi-user ownership
   - BtkNetwork: TCP/UDP sockets, HTTP, SSL/TLS, DNS, network proxies
   - BtkXml: DOM and SAX XML parsing, stream readers/writers
   - BtkSql: Database access with driver plugins
   - BtkSvg: SVG rendering and display
   - BtkOpenGL: Cross-platform OpenGL rendering
   - BtkVulkan: Cross-platform Vulkan rendering
   - BtkMultimedia: Audio, video, camera, and media playback
   - BtkWebKit: Embedded web browser engine
   - BtkXmlPatterns: XQuery, XPath, and XML schema validation
   - BtkBml: Declarative UI runtime (BTK Markup Language)

tasks.subject: Create comprehensive Go porting plan for entire BTK framework
tasks.description:
Develop a detailed, incremental plan for porting all BTK modules from C++ to Go, including:
1. Priority ordering based on dependencies (start with Core, then Gui, Network, etc.)
2. Coding standards and conventions for Go port
3. Testing strategy for each module
4. Integration approach with existing Go components
5. Timeline and milestones
